title: strategy.card.eligible.v1 payload
description: Payload of the strategy.card.eligible.v1 event — notification that a strategy-card candidate is eligible for the (aggregate, cross-tenant) skill bank because it is backed by a B-verified experiment outcome. AggregateContext (k-anonymity carried by the envelope's aggregate context — ADR-0006 rev.2 / ADR-0013), NOT engine-id-required. This is the fail-closed intake boundary ONLY (wave5-plan.md non-scope: no auto-approval / global sharing / production learning loop).
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024 — additive-minor; no additionalProperties:false; undeclared-key rejection is a policy-gate obligation, not schema-enforced). Authority: docs/architecture/wave5-plan.md deliverable 3 exit E7 (skill-bank consumes ONLY B-verified outcomes, fail-closed), Stage-2 w5-16 (B-verified-only skill-bank intake boundary). Producer strategy-skill-bank-service (existing AsyncAPI operation summary convention). Channel context_type is 'aggregate' (already in the AsyncAPI file) — k-anonymity/lineage fields (aggregate_scope_id, cohort_size, privacy_threshold, de_identification_status, lineage_audit_ref) live on the ENVELOPE's aggregate branch (ADR-0013), NOT duplicated here. AGGREGATE-ONLY / PRIVACY: this payload carries NO tenant-identifying fields (no tenant_id/run_id/experiment_id) and NO raw customer content — only aggregate-safe references. source_outcome.b_verdict is const 'pass' — a card can only become eligible from a B-VERIFIED (pass) outcome (fail-closed: fail/undetermined outcomes never reach here). source_outcome.evidence_bundle_manifest_hash is a content-addressed hash ONLY (evidence provenance without exposing tenant data).

card_candidate_ref.$comment: Opaque aggregate-safe reference to the strategy-card candidate (skill-bank intake id) — NOT tenant-identifying.

b_verdict.$comment: Const 'pass': eligibility is fail-closed — ONLY a B-verified (pass) source outcome can make a card eligible (E7). fail/undetermined outcomes can never satisfy this const.

evidence_bundle_manifest_hash.$comment: Content-addressed hash of the backing evidence-bundle manifest (domain/evidence-bundle-manifest/v1.manifest_hash) — provenance anchor with NO tenant-identifying or raw-content exposure (k-anonymity preserved).
